arts.ttl: Alaves 0-1 Real Madrid: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Kylian Mbappe sees red in narrow Los Blancos success
arts.sum: Real Madrid survive a first-half red card for Kylian Mbappe to record a 1-0 victory over Alaves in Sunday's La Liga contest.

arts.ttl: Alaves 0-1 Real Madrid: Player ratings as horror Mbappe tackle fails to derail champions
arts.sum: Player ratings as Real Madrid edge to an important win in La Liga - one they secured despite losing Kylian Mbappe to the first red card of his career.

arts.ttl: La Liga Title Race: Barcelona, Real Madrid, Atletico Madrid Next Five Games After Matchweek 31
arts.sum: Barcelona still lead the La Liga title race with Real Madrid and Atlético Madrid struggling to keep up.

arts.ttl: ‘Die, scum’ – Real Madrid star targeted with horrific chants during Alavés clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s La Liga meeting with Deportivo Alavés this evening was brought to a temporary halt by the team of officials. This came owing to a round of disgusting chants…

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe sent off for 'disgusting' horror challenge - just days before Real Madrid's crucial Champions League second leg against Arsenal
arts.sum: The Real Madrid star was given his marching orders for the reckless challenge in the first half of his side's LaLiga trip to Deportivo Alaves. It comes three days before Madrid welcome Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe sent off for horror challenge just days before Real Madrid host Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid will welcome Arsenal to the Bernabeu on Wednesday night but their preparations hit a bump in the road when Kylian Mbappe picked up a straight red card away at Alaves

arts.ttl: Mbappé sent off for reckless tackle in Madrid clash
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe was shown a straight red card for a dangerous challenge during the first half of Real Madrid's crucial La Liga clash with Alaves.

arts.ttl: Alaves 0–1 Real Madrid: Player Ratings As Los Blancos Hold on After Kylian Mbappe's Red Card
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé was sent off in Real Madrid's 0–1 victory against Alavés.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star becomes first top-5 league player to hit 50-game mark for the season
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Federico Valverde has on Sunday secured for himself an altogether impressive top-5 league benchmark. This comes owing to his appearance in the club’s latest outing. Real Madrid…

arts.ttl: What games will Kylian Mbappé miss for Real Madrid after red card vs Alavés?
arts.sum: An insight into the extent of the predicted ban facing Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé for his red card on Sunday has been forthcoming online. The name of frontman Mbappé…
